features: WATERPROOF: Masterplast Butterfly Closure Strips are waterproof making them the ideal dressings for use in and around water. Total protection in the shower, whilst washing and swimming.
SECURE: Each strip securely closes holding in place minor wounds, supporting and protecting
HEALING: Protective waterproof breathable strip to protect and aid healing
STERILE: Individually wrapped for safety, two sizes to suit a variety of cuts . The Masterplast Butterfly Closure Strips box contains 18 of each size
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Box of 36 Strips
description: Product Description Masterplast Butterfly Closure Strips are waterproof making them the ideal dressings for use in and around water. Each strip securely closes holding in place minor wounds, supporting and protecting. Total protection in the shower, whilst washing and swimming. Individually wrapped for safety, two sizes to suit a variety of cuts. Box contains 18 of each size Directions Apply the strip to skin around wound, ensuring it is dry. Press gently secure. No need wet wound before application.
